The '''Starboard Broadside Club''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] aboard ''[[Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport/Legends|Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport]]''. It was owned by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Broadside (Wookiee)|Broadside]]. It was lit by the large [[Viewport/Legends|viewports]] that took in the ambient light created by orbiting a sun or planet. The club was staffed by [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] serving girls who provided drinks and hearty meals to the clientele.

The club was outfitted with luxurious [[Leather/Legends|leather]]-covered chairs, shiny metal fixtures, and sparkling glassware. A small stage was in the back, where a band often played music for the patrons. The club also had gaming tables for entertainment.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''
